calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-302 relief-completion discriminative pair -- recalibrated comparator (window=30, threshold=0.005)
items.notes: EXQ-517 produced 0 events across all 3 seeds: 5-step window / 0.05 threshold cannot resolve 0.002/step limb-healing dynamics. Recalibrated: window 5->30, threshold 0.05->0.005, min_norm 0.02->0.01. Gate (c) for MECH-304 conditioned-inhibition experiment.
